name: personal-website
description: A modern, anime-themed personal website with liquid glass design, falling snow effects, and background music controls

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run minify && npm run optimize
scripts.minify: npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js
scripts.minify:css: cleancss -o dist/assets/css/style.min.css assets/css/style.css && cleancss -o dist/assets/css/snow.min.css assets/css/snow.css
scripts.minify:js: terser assets/js/main.js -o dist/assets/js/main.min.js -c -m && terser assets/js/snow.js -o dist/assets/js/snow.min.js -c -m && terser assets/js/music.js -o dist/assets/js/music.min.js -c -m
scripts.optimize: npm run optimize:images && npm run optimize:html
scripts.optimize:images: mkdir -p dist/assets/images && cp assets/images/* dist/assets/images/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.test: npm run test:lint && npm run test:performance
scripts.deploy: npm run build && echo 'Build complete. Deploy dist/ folder to your server.'
scripts.pwa:generate: npm run pwa:icons && npm run pwa:manifest
scripts.pwa:icons: mkdir -p assets/images && echo 'Place your icon images in assets/images/'

author: Viet Anh

pwa.name: Viet Anh - Personal Website
pwa.description: Trang web cá nhân của Viet Anh với giao diện anime, hiệu ứng tuyết rơi và nhạc nền
